CONTENT.Career: Seufert made his professional debut for 1. FC Kaiserslautern on 25 October 2017, starting in a home match in the second round of the 2017–18 DFB-Pokal against Bundesliga club VfB Stuttgart.In May 2021 Greuther Fürth, newly promoted to the Bundesliga, announced the signing of Seufert for the 2021–22 season. He signed a contract until 2024 and joined on a free transfer from Arminia Bielefeld.On 1 January 2022, Seufert was loaned to SV Sandhausen until the end of the season.On 10 July 2023, Seufert signed a two-year contract with SV Ried in Austria.

SUMMARY: Nils Seufert (born 3 February 1997) is a German professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Austrian club SV Ried.
